+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

exec
/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '2058,2078p' chapters/connections/concordance.tex" in /Users/raeez/chiral-bar-cobar succeeded in 52ms:
 $\delta H^{(1)}=\Lambda_P(\mathfrak Q^{(0)})$ is the first
 tensorial modular invariant beyond the $\hat{A}$-genus
 (Theorem~\ref{thm:nms-beyond-ahat}). For the Virasoro,
 $\delta H^{(1)}_{\mathrm{Vir}}
 =120/[c^2(5c+22)]\cdot x^2$.
\item The \emph{branch-line reductions} appendix
 (Appendix~\ref{app:branch-line-reductions}) extracts exact
 finite-dimensional quotients: the universal genus-$3$
 constant~$7$, genus-$2$ transparency, and the spectral
 cumulant hierarchy.
\item The \emph{ambient complementarity upgrade}
 (\S\ref{sec:ambient-complementarity-lagrangian}) upgrades
 Theorem~C from additive splitting to shifted-symplectic
 Lagrangian geometry: one ambient deformation problem with two
 Lagrangian maps, a complementarity potential~$S_\cA$ whose
 Taylor jets are the nonlinear modular invariants, a derived
 critical locus governing simultaneous self-dual deformations,
 and a fake-complementarity criterion detecting when the dual
 Lagrangian is linear
 (Proposition~\ref{prop:fake-complementarity-criterion}).

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

Theorems~A--D belong to axis~2.
Theorem~H (chiral Hochschild) connects them: at generic level,
$\ChirHoch^n = 0$ for $n > 2$ with $P(t) = 1 + t^2$
(concentration from the de~Rham bound on a curve);
the continuous Lie algebra cohomology
$H^*_{\mathrm{cont}} = \mathbb{C}[\Theta_1, \ldots, \Theta_r]$
is an unbounded invariant that degenerates to the
exterior$\otimes$polynomial ring
$\Lambda^*(P_1, \ldots, P_r) \otimes
\mathbb{C}[\Theta_1, \ldots, \Theta_r]$ at critical level.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+completion packet

+prefundamental generation and pro-Weyl recovery are proved on that
+surface. The remaining completion step is therefore a Baxter-
+constrained compact-completion problem, not an independent
+rank-induction packet.

thinking
**Updating theorem summaries**

I’m considering updating the summary for the H theorem. It's not strictly necessary, but I think it would improve accuracy. I might search for `w-algebra-hochschild`, but my previous search didn’t return useful results, particularly after the last patch. I'll need to check again after the final patch. It looks like I should also inspect patch 11274 for its summary. I want to take a broader look at this!

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '11270,11290p' chapters/connections/concordance.tex" in /Users/raeez/chiral-bar-cobar succeeded in 54ms:
 classes including class~M
 (Theorem~\ref{thm:bv-bar-coderived}); the tree-level
 amplitude pairing is conditional on
 Corollary~\ref{cor:string-amplitude-genus0}; the
 genuswise chain-level BV/BRST/bar identification remains
 conjectural (Conjecture~\ref{conj:v1-master-bv-brst};
 class~M chain-level false).
 MC3 splits into three layers
 (Corollary~\ref{cor:mc3-all-types}):
 MC3a/b unconditional for all simple types;
 MC3c (full Cat~$\cO$) unconditional in type~A,
 conditional on Conjecture~\ref{conj:rank-independence-step2}
 (Lemma~L) in other types.
 The broader programme contains open problems downstream
 of MC3: the DK-4/5 extension/completion packet
 (Conjecture~\ref{conj:dk-compacts-completion}),
 multi-generator universality at $g \geq 2$
 (Open Problem~\ref{op:multi-generator-universality}, now
 resolved negatively: cross-channel correction nonzero),
 modular cooperad completion,

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.

+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),

+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.

+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

-landscape by Proposition~\ref{prop:lagrangian-perfectness}).
+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

thinking
**Investigating labels and definitions**

I find it interesting that there's no clear definition for the label I'm looking for. Maybe the theorem label isn't in concordance with what I'm expecting. It could be imported from another file, which complicates things. If I use a command like grep, it might not show the label because there could be spaces around the label or a macro affecting it. I need to search more deeply to figure this out.

+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.

+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

thinking
**Considering ambient complementarity**

I'm thinking about the conjecture or conditional theorem for ambient complementarity upgrades. It’s interesting to consider how this could impact labels and references. But I wonder if it may also be a more invasive change than expected. It's a balance between improving efficiency and managing the potential complications that could come along with it. I’ll need to think about the implications carefully to get this right!
codex
The complementarity lane needed one more structural repair: the concordance still had an internal proved theorem where the source now only gives a conditional C2 upgrade. I’m splitting the proved C1 Verdier-side statement from the conditional C2 BV-side statement inside the concordance itself so the constitution no longer contradicts its own package table.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+The proved core on

+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})

+Independent direct arrows

+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.

+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.

+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

-\paragraph{MC3 three-layer split and Lemma~L.}
-Corollary~\ref{cor:mc3-all-types} is rewritten as an
-explicit three-layer decomposition: MC3a (evaluation-generated
-core, all simple types, unconditional), MC3b (categorical
-thick generation, all types, unconditional), MC3c (full
-category~$\cO$, type~A unconditional, other types conditional
-on Conjecture~\ref{conj:rank-independence-step2}).
-The new Conjecture~\ref{conj:rank-independence-step2}
-(Lemma~L, the lift-and-lower hypothesis) is the sole
-remaining input for MC3 beyond type~A: shifted prefundamental
-representations in non-type-A types should satisfy
-lift-and-lower from a maximal-rank type-$A$ Levi subalgebra.
+\paragraph{MC3 after the type-$A$ reduction.}
+Corollary~\ref{cor:mc3-all-types} still records the two unconditional
+all-types layers: categorical prefundamental Clebsch--Gordan and the
+DK-2/3 comparison on the evaluation-generated core.
+The new load-bearing theorem is
+Theorem~\ref{thm:mc3-type-a-resolution}: in type~$A$ the old
+four-packet post-core problem is reduced to the single compact-
+completion packet
+Conjecture~\ref{conj:dk-compacts-completion}. The proved post-core
+surface is the Baxter-locus seed
+$\{V_{\omega_i}(a)\}\cup\{L^-_{i,a-\frac{1}{2}}\}$, with the spectral
+constraint supplied by
+Proposition~\ref{prop:baxter-yangian-equivariance}; shifted-
+prefundamental generation and pro-Weyl recovery are proved on that
+surface. The remaining completion step is therefore a Baxter-
+constrained compact-completion problem, not an independent
+rank-induction packet.
 
 
 \paragraph{Holographic central charge identification (conjectural).}

 succeeded in 51ms:

\paragraph{Ran-coherent bar-cobar equivalence.}
Theorem~\ref{thm:ran-coherent-bar-cobar} resolves the Ran-space
formality gap identified in earlier audits: the bar-cobar
quasi-isomorphism extends coherently from
$\operatorname{Ran}^{\leq n}(X)$ to all of
$\operatorname{Ran}(X)$ via the strong completion-tower theorem
and the degree cutoff lemma.

\paragraph{Ambient complementarity routing.}
Theorem~\ref{thm:ambient-complementarity-fmp} is no longer recorded
as an unconditional upgrade from additive splitting. The proved
Verdier-side package gives the Lagrangian geometry on
$C_g = R\Gamma(\overline{\mathcal{M}}_g,\mathcal{Z}_\cA)$; the
ambient $(-1)$-shifted symplectic formal-moduli upgrade is the
conditional C2 lane, routed through
Theorem~\ref{thm:shifted-symplectic-complementarity} and therefore
scoped to the uniform-weight BV package.

 succeeded in 52ms:
The natural strengthening is a Lagrangian-polarization theorem,
now proved in two layers:

\begin{theorem}[Lagrangian complementarity package;
C1 \ClaimStatusProvedHere, C2 \ClaimStatusConditional]\label{thm:lagrangian-complementarity}
\index{Lagrangian!complementarity|textbf}
For a modular Koszul pair $(\cA, \cA^!)$, the following hold:
\begin{enumerate}[label=\textup{(\roman*)}]
\item the complex
 $C_g := R\Gamma(\overline{\mathcal{M}}_g, \mathcal{Z}_{\cA})$
 carries the proved Verdier-side
 $(-(3g{-}3))$-shifted symplectic structure of
 Proposition~\textup{\ref{prop:ptvv-lagrangian}}, and
 $Q_g(\cA)$ and $Q_g(\cA^!)$ embed as complementary
 Lagrangians in the sense of
 Pantev--To\"en--Vaqui\'e--Vezzosi~\cite{PTVV13};
\item under the perfectness and nondegeneracy hypotheses of
 Theorem~\textup{\ref{thm:ambient-complementarity-tangent}(iii)}
 and the uniform-weight BV input of
 Theorem~\textup{\ref{thm:shifted-symplectic-complementarity}},

+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.

+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

**Evaluating table format adjustments**

I'm noticing the same existing `---` lines in the table. It might be good to mention that only those pre-existing separators were affected. I wonder if we should fix it within the scope since it's in the same file. Changing `& --- \\` to something like `& \textemdash` feels tricky since AGENTS forbids em dash. Alternatives like `& none \\` or `& \textup{n/a} \\` could work instead. The user asked about the AP29 pattern, and I see line 3017 needs attention, perhaps removing `---` entirely. +\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+prefundamental generation and pro-Weyl recovery are proved on that
+surface. The remaining completion step is therefore a Baxter-
+constrained compact-completion problem, not an independent
+rank-induction packet.

-to PBW via Keller classicality. From this core,
-Ext diagonal vanishing~(\ref{item:kp-ext}) follows by bigrading
-constraints,

-monadic descent (\cite[Prop.~4.7.3.16]{HA}),

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

-\emph{Proof circuit.}
-The core cycle
-(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild})
-is proved by PBW concentration~$\to$

-Ext diagonal vanishing~(\ref{item:kp-ext}) follows by bigrading

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.

+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

thinking
**Considering compile status**

I'm thinking that the compilation process is really extensive and might still be running past the token limit. I could either poll it until it's finished or see if it's enough since there haven't been errors yet. But since the compile output is ongoing, I need to figure out the final status eventually. Maybe I can poll with fewer tokens after waiting some time.

-landscape by Proposition~\ref{prop:lagrangian-perfectness}).
+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

-Ext diagonal vanishing~(\ref{item:kp-ext}) follows by bigrading

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})

+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.

**Structuring Theorem Report**

I’m thinking about how to list various theorems clearly. Using bullets is a good idea, keeping each item concise, maybe two lines per bullet. I’m aiming for about 11 items. Each bullet will have all relevant fields in a single line, making it neat, like: `- Theorem A. BEFORE: ... ISSUE: ... ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: ... CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: none.` I want to make sure to have a strong header and organize the content into a verification paragraph followed by the report, without overdoing the details.
thinking
**Finalizing Package Report**

I’m considering how to incorporate all touched packages and meta items in a clear manner. One idea is to mention the compilation failure path in a clickable format, such as [bar_cobar_adjunction_inversion.tex]. I also need to highlight an undefined control sequence like `\E`. For the final version, I think we should aim for around 13 bullets, ensuring that the total length is about 40-50 lines. Keeping it organized will help!

The concordance now matches the live theorem surfaces for A/B/C/D/H, MC2-5, topologization, and Koszul items (vii)/(viii), including the non-circular routing remark for D, the coderived off-locus lane for B, the C0/C1/C2 split for C, the `\gAmod` versus `(\gAmod)^{E_1}` carrier split for MC2, and the Baxter-locus/compact-completion formulation for MC3.

Verification: I reread the touched regions, `rg -F '\Omega/z'` and `rg -F 'T^c(s^{-1} A)'` returned no hits in `concordance.tex`, and the non-comment AP29 grep returned no hits. A full `latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error main.tex` run progressed past the concordance and then failed on a pre-existing unrelated undefined control sequence `\E` in [bar_cobar_adjunction_inversion.tex](/Users/raeez/chiral-bar-cobar/chapters/theory/bar_cobar_adjunction_inversion.tex:1890).

## Platonic Rectification Report
- Theorem A. BEFORE: bar-cobar adjunction with vague “Verdier intertwining,” status proved. ISSUE: the algebra-level Verdier half was overstated before `\mathbb{D}_{\Ran}`. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance now states the strongest proved form, namely the algebra-level identification only after `\mathbb{D}_{\Ran}`. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: none.

- Theorem B. BEFORE: Koszul-locus inversion plus stale conditional higher-genus/off-locus language. ISSUE: the source now proves strict q.i. on the Koszul locus and unconditional coderived continuation off it. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance records strict q.i. on-locus, unconditional coderived coacyclic-equivalence off-locus, and promotion back to ordinary q.i. on collapse loci. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: none on the stated surface.

- Theorem C. BEFORE: one compressed “complementarity” sentence with shifted-symplectic upgrade sounding proved. ISSUE: C0/C1/C2 were conflated, and C2 was overstated. ACTION: INTERMEDIATE. AFTER: the concordance now splits C0 coderived fiber-center identification, C1 genus-sensitive duality/Lagrangian statement, and C2 conditional shifted-symplectic/BV upgrade on the uniform-weight package. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: C2 remains conditional on the uniform-weight BV package.

- Theorem D. BEFORE: scalar formula stated too globally, without the routing remark. ISSUE: the strongest proved form is uniform-weight all-genera plus genus-1 universality, not unrestricted all-genera; the proof path had to be marked non-circular. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance states `\mathrm{obs}_g=\kappa\lambda_g` on the proved uniform-weight lane, genus-1 universality for all families, multi-weight cross-channel correction for `g\ge 2`, and the non-circular route `\Theta_\cA \to \mathrm{obs}_g \to` family index. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: unrestricted multi-weight all-genera scalar universality is false.

- Theorem H. BEFORE: mixed generic-level and critical-level summaries, with example-level labels standing in for the theorem package. ISSUE: Theorem H is generic-level/Koszul-locus only, and the FM-collapse mechanism was missing. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance now records concentration in `{0,1,2}`, duality, degree-`≤2` Hilbert growth, affine-KM `\ChirHoch^1\cong\fg`, and the collision-depth collapse via local Fulton-MacPherson formality; critical level is explicitly outside Theorem H. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: critical level is separate by design.

- MC2. BEFORE: the concordance used the MC element without distinguishing carriers. ISSUE: `\gAmod` and `(\gAmod)^{E_1}` were conflated. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: MC2 is now stated on the coinvariant carrier `\gAmod`, with the ordered lift in `(\gAmod)^{E_1}` routed to `thm:e1-mc-element`. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: none.

- MC3. BEFORE: old three-layer/Lemma-L packaging dominated the concordance. ISSUE: the live surface is evaluation-core all-types plus a type-A Baxter-locus reduction, with compact-completion isolated. ACTION: INTERMEDIATE. AFTER: the concordance now records all-types categorical CG and DK-2/3 on the evaluation-generated core, plus the type-A post-core route on the Baxter-locus seed, with the remaining gap isolated as `conj:dk-compacts-completion`. CONFIDENCE: medium-high. REMAINING GAP: compact-completion extension remains open; off-seed post-core extension still depends on the Baxter-constrained route.

- MC4. BEFORE: resonance was described too loosely as a generic finite-dimensional reduction. ISSUE: the corrected surface is the transferred split filtration, and new families still need transfer verification. ACTION: INTERMEDIATE. AFTER: the concordance now states the strongest proved form: positive towers by stabilization, resonance on the transferred split surface of `thm:resonance-filtered-bar-cobar` and `thm:platonic-completion`, with new-family work reduced to transfer verification. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: family-specific transfer packages remain to be checked beyond the standard landscape.

- MC5. BEFORE: some summaries already reflected coderived status, but the later concordance still drifted. ISSUE: coderived unconditional versus chain-level conditional needed to stay explicit everywhere. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance consistently says coderived BV=bar is proved for all four shadow classes, including class M, while the genuswise chain-level identification remains conjectural and class-M chain-level is false. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: chain-level MC5 remains open.

- Topologization. BEFORE: scoped correctly in one place but not integrated with the rest of the theorem-package sync. ISSUE: the strongest proved form had to be held fixed: cohomological affine-KM theorem, zero-differential chain model, original-complex lift conditional, general case conjectural. ACTION: INTERMEDIATE. AFTER: the concordance now consistently reflects that scope. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: original cochains require the coherence equation; non-affine-KM remains conjectural.

- Koszul (vii). BEFORE: genus-0 and all-genera lanes were compressed together. ISSUE: the all-genera statement is only true on the uniform-weight lane, and that narrowing is optimal. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance now states genus-0 factorization-homology concentration as the unconditional equivalence, the uniform-weight all-genera upgrade as proved, and multi-weight principal `\mathcal W` boundary counterexamples via `\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}}\neq 0`. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: none on the stated surface.

- Koszul (viii). BEFORE: the Hochschild consequence was underspecified and risked being read as a stronger algebra-freeness claim. ISSUE: the strongest proved output is concentration + duality + polynomial Hilbert growth + `E_2`-formality, not blanket freeness. ACTION: STRENGTHENED. AFTER: the concordance now states exactly that package and records generic Virasoro as the boundary counterexample to freeness. CONFIDENCE: high. REMAINING GAP: no converse from (viii) back to bar-cobar inversion is proved.

+\emph{Proof web.}
+The proved core on
+(\ref{item:kp-def})--(\ref{item:kp-facthom}),
+(\ref{item:kp-nullvec}), (\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+is a web, not a single chain.
+The shortest loop is
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-def})
+via the fundamental theorem of chiral twisting morphisms.
+Independent direct arrows
+(\ref{item:kp-def})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}),
+(\ref{item:kp-ainfty})$\Rightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy}),
+(\ref{item:kp-barcobar})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-barrbeck}),
+and
+(\ref{item:kp-facthom})$\Leftrightarrow$(\ref{item:kp-pbw})
+bypass the old linear spine; the Ext, Kac--Shapovalov,
+and FM-boundary criteria
+(\ref{item:kp-ext}), (\ref{item:kp-nullvec}),
+(\ref{item:kp-fmbdy})
+each force PBW collapse directly.
+Hence no single proved implication disconnects the unconditional
+core.
+The factorization-homology arrow is genus-$0$ in general and
+upgrades to all genera only on the uniform-weight lane; multi-weight
+principal $\mathcal{W}$-algebras witness the boundary failure of the
+stronger all-genera claim through
+$\delta F_g^{\mathrm{cross}} \neq 0$.
+The Hochschild statement~(\ref{item:kp-hochschild}) remains a
+proved one-way consequence on the Koszul locus: it is obtained from
+bar-cobar inversion via Theorem~H, polynomial growth, and
+$\Etwo$-formality, with no converse back to the bar-cobar counit.
+The Lagrangian criterion~(\ref{item:kp-lagrangian}) is conditional
+in general, and the
+$\mathcal{D}$-module purity statement~(\ref{item:kp-dmod}) is
+one-directional.
